summary: Comprehensive testing of Kaimera Learning education marketplace completed. Backend APIs working with 89.5% success rate. Frontend user flows functional with minor UI issues identified.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to ObjectId serialization problem

minor_issues.issue: Validation error when class_id is None in insufficient credits test

ui_bugs.issue: Unapproved teacher (teacher2) can access dashboard but no approval pending message is displayed

passed_tests: Authentication for all user roles (admin, student, teacher)
Credit deduction after booking (50 → 45 credits confirmed)
Payment dialog and credit package selection
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix class creation endpoint ObjectId serialization error. Add approval pending message for unapproved teachers in UI.
